description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly tan and dark green color scheme accented by blue highlights. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer components, giving it a modern, industrial appearance. It has a prominent, boxy receiver with a mounted sight or scope on top, and a thick, cylindrical barrel with visible venting and ribbing. The grip is ergonomic, with a pronounced trigger guard and a secondary foregrip for stability. The stock is compact and integrated into the rear, suggesting a design optimized for maneuverability in urban environments. Various rails and attachment points are visible, indicating modularity for accessories.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a tan and green body, blue accents, and a compact, ergonomic design featuring a mounted sight and modular rails.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, tan and green body, mounted sight, and ergonomic grip with blue highlights.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening, venting, and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the stock and attachment rails.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, sight alignment, and the overall narrow profile.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with visible venting and ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a reinforced lower edge and ergonomic finger groove
